examples: An overzealous security guard checked inside the baby's bottle.
After pulling out huge blocks of concrete and piles of dirt from the hole, the excavator operator got a little overzealous.
Another classic trap is alienating your boss with your overzealous self-promotion.
Does this deportation case fall into an area of what some people see as overzealous prosecution?
For years most courts protected people against overzealous prosecutors by limiting the law's use.
